characters.name: Minase Taki
characters.description:
The main character. A high school student who discovers the black magic book (known as the "Bible Black") in an abandoned school basement. With this discovery, he becomes a pawn of powerful forces in a sinister plot.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bible_Black]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Imari Kurumi
characters.description:
Minase’s childhood friend and de facto girlfriend. She comes over to wake Minase up every morning. She knows everything about Minase, and tries to help him in every way. Note: She is black belt holder of shrinji kempo and very tough. She is good at cooking and takes care of Minase when Yukiko is away.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bible_Black]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Kitami Reika
characters.description:
The mysterious, seductive school nurse and the main antagonist of the series. She seems to take a liking for Minase, and she knows about his experiments with black magic. She has a lengthy history. [spoiler]Twelve years ago, Kitami was the chosen as a human sacrifice for the ritual to summon the devil. However, it resulted in all of the cult members' demise and she made contract with the devil to save her life. Now she has her eyes on Imari whose body she plans to exchange soul with in order to not be sent to hell.[/spoiler]

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bible_Black]Wikipedia[/url]]

traits.name: Consensual Group Sex of One Female and Several Males

characters.name: Takashiro Hiroko
characters.description:
The school art professor. She’s in charge of the art club, which both Minase and Imari are part of. She’s very popular among the students for her good looks and personality.[spoiler]She was the former leader of the mysterious witchcraft club from twelve years ago, Rose Cross, and the only survivor who once experience the horror of Dark Magic. Not wanting anyone else to fall into the temptation, she honed her magical skill which is put to use when history begins to repeat.[/spoiler]

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bible_Black]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Saeki Kaori
characters.description:
Minase’s classmate. She’s obsessed with the occult, and has established a new occult group based on the one from twelve years ago. She knows a lot about black magic, and her fortune telling is very popular. She becomes interested in Minase after learning about Minase possessing the book.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bible_Black]Wikipedia[/url]]

traits.name: Group Sex of One Male and Several Females

characters.name: Shiraki Rika
characters.description:
The head of the student council. Wealthy and untouchable, she’s very popular among the boys. She also has a crush on Minase.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bible_Black]Wikipedia[/url]]

traits.name: Group Sex of One Male and Several Females

characters.name: Minase Yukiko
characters.description:
First presented to be his stepsister, she is actually Minase’s live-in cousin and guardian, with the two acting like siblings due to them being close. She’s a strong-willed person, and enjoys tormenting Minase as well as teasing him at home with flashy outfits. Since she learned Latin and French in grad school, she helps Minase translate the contents of the book.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bible_Black]Wikipedia[/url]]

traits.name: Group Sex of One Female and Several Males

characters.name: Itou Mika
characters.description:
Minase’s classmate and one of Saeki’s followers. She defends Saeki when Minase makes fun of her. She’s the first victim of Minase's practice of the book.

[From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bible_Black]Wikipedia[/url]]

characters.name: Nami
characters.description: The priestess who presided over the ritual 12 years ago and the one who tried to sacrifice Kitami. In a fit of insanity after she was unable to open the Gate of Orkus, Nami murdered all the other members of the Rose Cross club in an attempt to summon the devil, before she was killed by Kitami herself.
